localized_texts.text: Night Safari

Retreat into this mysterious animal kingdom and heighten your senses for the nocturnal Ultimate Wildlife Experience. Under the moonlit skies, immerse yourself in a magical kingdom where wild animals roam when they are most naturally active.Meet over 1,000 creatures from 120 species as you embark on an adventure on our tram ride and four walking trails. Start the night on a high as our fiery Thumbuakar tribal performers welcome you into the Park and get set for a truly close encounter with the wild.
Hop on our open-sided tram and journey through 6 of the world’s geographical regions.
Explore our Safari Trails and embark on the Safari Tram Adventure. Your night here is set to be wild!
The night's calling! There’s no better way to experience the ‘dark of the action’ than to embark on one of our multi-sensory activities.
Embark on a wild nocturnal adventure
Activities:
- Wildlife Experiences: Go on a buggy-and-walking adventure in the company of an expert guide who will revel you with insider tales about our animals.
- Presentations: Catch our presentations to witness the amazing talents of our animals and performers.
- Keeper Talks: Coming on a weekend? Be sure to catch our big cats in action during their snack time and watch them devour their meaty treats!
- Unique Dining Experience: Escape the city life and enjoy a night at Night Safari's Tipi tent. Indulge in an evening of gourmet food and amazing wildlife encounters!

- Night Photography E-Guide: Having a challenge with your night shots? Learn how you can create that insta-worthy photo with tips and tricks from 4 of Sony’s Photographers. Download the e-guide and be ready to impress!

- Indian Rhino Feeding at East Lodge Trail: Get up close with these one-horned heavyweights as they feed off your hand under the moonlit sky. Don’t miss out on this great photo moment! This experience is available as an add-on for $10 per food portion.
Operation Hours: Please kindly visit Night Safari's official website for any updates
Dresscode: Casual wear recommended.
Accessibility: Wheelchair, stroller, and electric scooters accessible.

How to use: Your booking is confirmed. The final ticket will be sent to you separately. Please present either mobile or printed final voucher for redemption.

Terms & Conditions: Valid for one usage only. Ticket is valid on the selected date and time 2pax and above will be provided in Buffet Style. A complimentary meal for a child below 6 years of age is limited to one (1) child per one (1) accompanying adult. A child who does not meet this rule shall be charged at child's rate. Reservation is subject to availability at the time of booking All TA Admission Tickets are subject to WRS Parks’ prevailing “Park Ticket Terms & Conditions” published at https://www.mandai.com/en/park-terms.html. No return, exchange, cancellation and/or cash refund of TA Local Admission Tickets purchased and/or issued is allowed. Admission is at the voucher holder's own risk. WRS will not be responsible for any loss, damage or injury sustained by the voucher holder while in the park Voucher holder agrees not to use photographs/ recording in the park for commercial purposes. WRS may take photographs/recordings of any park visitor for any purpose, without prior approval or compensation; In the event of dispute, WRS electronic records shall prevail; No claims will be entertained for any lost, torn, defaced or expired voucher. Ticket prices and governing conditions are subject to change without notice
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy

How to use: Once you received the ticket, please secure your preferred date and timeslot in advance before visiting our parks from the below link https://reseller.mandai.com/ticketstore/GuestBookTimeslot
How to use: Upon confirmation of date/time via the link, there is no change of timeslot upon e-ticket with barcode being issued.
How to use: Please arrive no later than 45 minutes from above selected time. If the park’s capacity has been reached, you may be required to wait till there is availability

What’s included: Ticket to Multi-Lingual Tram
How to use: 1. Please present both your admission ticket and multi-language tram ticket with QR codes at the entrance.
How to use: 2. Make your way to Tram Station 5 and arrive at least 10 minutes before your scheduled multi-language tram departure time.
How to use: 3. Present your multi-language tram ticket again to the staff at Tram Station 5 to confirm your booking.
How to use: 4. Collect your earphones from the staff before boarding the tram.
How to use: 5. Board the multi-language tram and enjoy your guided journey through the Night Safari!
How to use: 6. You are welcome to keep and reuse your earphones for other audio experiences. If you choose to dispose them, kindly use the recycling bin for both the earphones and packaging.
